findings.description: Victor Spénard (married Orise Lesage 29 September 1896) was the son of Maximin Spénard.
supporting_sources: Quebec Drouin Collection, marriage of Victor Spénard and Orise Lesage, 29 September 1896: "Victor Spénard, son of Maximin Spénard, farmer, and Zoé Brousseau."
1891 Census of Canada, Quebec: Victor Spénard listed in the household of his parents Maximin and Zoé Spénard.

findings.description: Victor Spénard (married Orise Lesage 29 September 1896) was the son of Zoé Brousseau.
supporting_sources: Quebec Drouin Collection, marriage of Victor Spénard and Orise Lesage, 29 September 1896: groom named as son of Maximin Spénard and Zoé Brousseau.
1891 Census of Canada, Quebec: Victor Spénard in the household of Maximin and Zoé Spénard.

findings.description: Victor Spénard's paternal grandfather (Maximin Spénard's father) was Jean Baptiste Spénard.
supporting_sources: Quebec Drouin Collection, baptism of Maximin Spénard, 31 October 1819: parents Jean Baptiste Spénard, cultivateur (farmer), and Geneviève Payan also known as St-Onge.

findings.description: Victor Spénard's paternal grandmother (Maximin Spénard's mother) was Geneviève Payan, also known as St-Onge.
supporting_sources: Quebec Drouin Collection, baptism of Maximin Spénard, 31 October 1819: parents Jean Baptiste Spénard and Geneviève Payan also known as St-Onge.

findings.description: Maximin Spénard married Zoé Brousseau on 2 June 1863; he was the widower of Exupine Perrault at the time.
supporting_sources: Quebec Drouin Collection, marriage of Maximin Spénard and Zoé Brousseau, 2 June 1863: groom the widower of Exupine Perrault; bride Zoé Brousseau, daughter of Joseph Brousseau.

findings.description: Maximin Spénard died 20 March 1901, age 82 (spouse Zoé Brousseau).
supporting_sources: Quebec Drouin Collection, burial of Maximin Spénard, died 20 March 1901, age 82, spouse Zoé Brousseau.
